raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Week three check-in","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, Sam?","description":"Safe opener that lets Sam set the context before any friction is raised.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"First ticket experience","name":"How has your first stretch of real tickets felt so far?","description":"Surfaces how the work itself is landing in week three without presuming a problem.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Done means what","name":"What does 'done' mean to you on the tickets you've picked up so far?","description":"Checks whether his mental model of completion matches the handoff expectations.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear handoffs","name":"Where are the handoffs still fuzzy for you?","description":"Finds the exact transition points that are creating uncertainty in onboarding.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Ship-time hesitation","name":"What tends to make shipping feel risky right before you send it?","description":"Gets at the specific trigger for late reassurance-seeking and hesitation.","purpose":"competency","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Tooling friction","name":"What part of your workflow is slowing you down most right now?","description":"Surfaces process or tooling friction that may be masquerading as confidence issues.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Support touchpoints","name":"What kind of check-in rhythm would help you most over the next two weeks?","description":"Identifies the right cadence and type of manager support while he is still ramping.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Go-to people","name":"Who do you already feel comfortable going to when you get stuck?","description":"Surfaces whether he has a usable support network or is still trying to solve everything alone.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-step focus","name":"Given what we've covered, what would you want to tighten up first?","description":"Closes by turning the discussion into a concrete near-term focus without introducing new topics.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
